title: selaginella wilsonii
intro: Selaginella wilsonii, also known as the Wilson's spikemoss, is a species of evergreen fern-like plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella wilsonii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of conditions, including fever, cough, and sore throats.
